0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Get Mnemosyne running in under 5 minutes. This guide covers installation, basic configuration, and your first memory operations."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"pip or uv package manager"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"First, activate the Hermes agent virtual environment:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"source ~/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/activate","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Then install Mnemosyne ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"with embeddings support"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# If your venv was created with python -m venv or virtualenv\npip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# If your venv was created with uv venv (pip is not included)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"uv venv does not include pip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you created the Hermes venv with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv venv"}],", running ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install"}]," will fail with \"command not found.\" This is by design — uv replaces pip with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip"}],". Always use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"uv pip install"}]," in uv-created environments."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"fastembed + sqlite-vec are both needed for semantic search"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["To get semantic vector search and hybrid retrieval, you need ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"both"}],":"]}],["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]}]," — installs fastembed, which converts text into semantic vectors"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]}]," — stores those vectors in SQLite for efficient similarity search"]}],"\n"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Install both:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings] sqlite-vec","language":"bash"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Without sqlite-vec, fastembed generates vectors but they are discarded — you still get FTS5 keyword search only. Without ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}],", there are no vectors at all. Both are required for:"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Semantic similarity search"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Context-aware retrieval"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Meaning-based memory matching"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Hybrid search (vector + text combined)"}],"\n"]}]]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Or with uv (recommended for speed):"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"uv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Initialize the Database"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Run the built-in installer to set up the SQLite database and schema:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python -m mnemosyne.install","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","blockquote",null,{"children":["\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Note:"}]," Mnemosyne uses SQLite with FTS5 for full-text search by default. With ","$L5"," installed, semantic vector search is available. An optional ","$L6"," package can further optimize vector storage — install it only if you need maximum query performance on large datasets."]}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld"],["$Le"],"$Lf"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"Ryp046-CiLeWf4Zbkzqof"}
5:["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]
6:["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"Confirm everything is working:"}]
9:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne stats","language":"bash"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"This should print memory statistics (e.g. total memories, database size). You can also check the version:"}]
b:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"hermes mnemosyne version","language":"bash"}]
